items.stem: To compute the perimeter of a rectangle you add the length, l and width, w and double this sum. a. Write an expression for the perimeter of a rectangle. b. Use the expression to ﬁnd the perimeter of a rectangle with length 30 and width 75.
items.workedSolution: a. The description for computing the perimeter of a rectangle first adds the length l and the width w of the rectangle l+w Then it asks us to double this sum, that means we are taking the sum and multiplying it by 2: perimeter of a rectangle = 2(l + w) b. Letting l = 30 and w = 75 we have perimeter of this rectangle = 2(30 + 75) = 2(105) = 210.
